name: Broadway Check Cashing
description_short: California Check Cashing offers check cashing, payroll advances up to $250, wire transfers, bill pay, and tax preparation at multiple Los Angeles-area locations with extended hours.
description_long: California Check Cashing operates as a financial services storefront with multiple locations across California, including Los Angeles, North Hollywood, and Palmdale. The company provides traditional check-cashing services alongside a broader suite of financial products designed for consumers seeking quick access to money and payment solutions. Their primary loan product is payroll advances capped at $250, available both in-store and online, requiring proof of income, government ID, and bank account information. The company positions itself as a convenience-focused alternative for busy Los Angeles residents needing same-day financial services. California Check Cashing distinguishes itself through extended operating hours (9 AM-7 PM weekdays, 10 AM-4 PM Saturday) and integration of multiple services under one roof, eliminating the need to visit separate providers for different financial needs. Their North Hollywood and Palmdale locations suggest regional presence beyond the primary Los Angeles market. The company emphasizes accessibility and speed as core value propositions, particularly for consumers on tight schedules. However, as a check-cashing and small-dollar lending operation, California Check Cashing serves primarily unbanked or underbanked populations with limited access to traditional banking. The $250 payroll advance cap is modest compared to payday lenders, but the company does not disclose APR, fees, or repayment terms on their website, making cost assessment impossible for consumers. The required disclosures include warnings that small-dollar loans used long-term can be expensive, indicating awareness of the debt cycle risks inherent in their business model. This is fundamentally a convenience service for immediate cash needs rather than a long-term financial solution.
pros: Extended weekday hours (9 AM-7 PM) and Saturday availability (10 AM-4 PM) for working consumers
Multiple services at one location: check cashing, bill pay, wire transfers, money orders, and tax preparation
Payroll advances available both in-store and online for added convenience
Multiple locations across California (Los Angeles, North Hollywood, Palmdale) for regional access
Low barrier to entry: government ID, proof of income, and bank account information only
Western Union integration for domestic and international money transfers
Green Dot prepaid debit card option for consumers without traditional bank accounts
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or repayment terms disclosed on website, preventing cost transparency
Payroll advance cap of $250 is significantly lower than payday lenders, limiting usefulness for larger emergencies
Website includes mandatory consumer warning that small-dollar loans used over time can be expensive, acknowledging debt cycle risk
No information on credit reporting, credit-building features, or alternative loan products for consumers seeking to improve credit
Limited online application details; most services appear to require in-store visits despite 'Start Online' language
best_for: Unbanked workers needing immediate check cashing without a traditional bank account
Employees seeking small payroll advances ($100-$250) between paychecks for immediate expenses
Los Angeles residents requiring bundled financial services (bill pay, wire transfers, money orders) in one location
International money transfer users within walking distance of Florence Ave or North Hollywood locations
diagnosis: California Check Cashing is best for unbanked or underbanked workers in the Los Angeles area who need quick access to small amounts of cash or bundled payment services. The primary caveat is the absence of published fees, APR, and repayment terms, combined with mandatory disclosures warning that small-dollar loans become expensive over time—this is a convenience service for immediate needs, not a financial solution for credit building or long-term borrowing.
services: Green Dot Visa prepaid debit cards
